We Help Busy Financial Professionals...

  • Fed up with endless Export-copy-and-paste?
  • Frustrated by constant searches for the right data?
  • Done with the hassle of QuickBooks Spreadsheet Sync?
  • Tired of dealing with outdated information?
Get Instant Relief

Automate, Sync & Streamline Your Data

GeniusSheets is the best solution for

  • End-of-period reporting
  • Building financial models in real-time
  • Live dashboards
  • Expense monitoring and drilldown
  • Manage and plan debt repayment
  • Custom budgets and alerts

"Genius Sheets is incredible. Updating models in Google Sheets or Excel to provide strategic advice is literally 1/3 of what I do, and this product has cut the time I spend doing this way down! Amazing ROI for any accountant."

Built Specifically For Finance Professionals

Tools designed to make your financial analysis and reporting work.

▶

How To Build a Live Report

Watch our easy guide to building live reports—get real-time data at your fingertips!

Watch the Walkthrough

Take a peek at what Genius Sheets can do for you—quick, easy, and hassle-free!

Native Integrations

We integrate directly with QuickBooks Online, Google Sheets, and Excel to create seamless data integrity across all platforms.

On-Demand Data Sync

We automatically update your transaction-level-data every day, giving you real-time visibility into your financial data.

Unlimited Sub Accounts

Add unlimited QuickBooks connections so you can manage all of your clients with ease and scale your book of business quickly.

Automate Your Financial Reporting in 3 Easy Steps

1

Start Your Free Trial

Select your plan and fill out our onboarding questionnaire before jumping into the platform.

2

Install Our App

Install our app within Excel or Google Sheets, and grant access to your QuickBooks giving you instant access to your financial data.

3

Get Financial Clarity

Pull automated reports and build custom formulas to enjoy a constant flow of accurate, complete financial data.

Frequently Asked Questions

These FAQs should help clarify how our platform can streamline and enhance your financial planning experience.

Yes! You can sign up with no credit card down for a two-week free trial. To upgrade, contact us at info@geniussheets.us.

Yes, for larger teams and organizations we offer customized enterprise plans. Contact info@geniussheets.us to learn more.

You can cancel a monthly subscription at any time. Simply send an email to info@geniussheets.us.

Connect your account to QuickBooks on the dashboard page of the website, then download either the Google Sheets or Excel add-in.

Check out our onboarding guide for detailed instructions on getting started with Genius Sheets.

Streamline financial reporting with seamless QuickBooks integration into Excel and Google Sheets.
